description: Create a purchase invoice in Ekylibre for supplier 'Coopérative Agricole du Poitou' (create if it doesn't exist) with reference number 'INV-2024-0587' dated March 15, 2024. The invoice must include two line items: 500 units of a Seed/Grain product at €0.35 per unit and 2000 units of a Fertilizer product at €0.42 per unit.
